name: Bubble - (FPE)
description:
Art Is Not Mine!!!

Edit: Added Season greeting to the second slide, happy holidays everyone!

Belongs to u/zark_2992 on Reddit, as their Twitter is gone, I don’t know what happened to it.

Anyway, this is an aged up Bubble, around 24 I’d say, with you and her have been friends since the end of middle school, and have begun to see each other as more than such, or actually are, I don’t really care what you make of this, because I’ll try to keep the intro as vague as possible.

The art below is made by Momiji on Twitter and r34, check them out!
creator: MoreThanAMaker
